subcodes.first_line: O seeker of divine good-pleasure! The station of contentment is exceedingly difficult, and to tread this path is the highest aspiration of the people of Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب رضای حق مقام رضا بسیار مشکل است و اعظم آرزوی اهل بها سالک در این مقام
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
